name: The Shining force Adventure
description:
Shinning a land that is about to be covered by darkness.

Years ago a powerful demon called Zeon was imprisoned with two sacred jewels, the one of darkness and the one of light in a place called the "Seal of the Earth". Zeon possessed the powers of the nine natural elements and had an army of four powerful generals (Mishaela, Zalvard, Cameela and Geshp) and a powerful creature under his control Dark Dragon a powerful force formed by warriors of all races chosen by the Goddess Mitula managed to defeat him and imprison him but he is about to awaken at the hands of his children Darksol and Odd Eye.

The shining force must be formed again and recover the ten swords to form Double Blade.

To your surprise you are the next chosen to lead this powerful force are you ready.
creator: Mathias87
